questions.question_text: Critically analyze the biological theories of criminality.
How would you classify criminal behavior?
What would be the focus of typology?
Describe various procedures and problems of Criminal Courts in Pakistan.
Define Juvenile probation. Explain the organization and administration of Juvenile probation services.
What are the principles and techniques of interrogation? How far these techniques have potential to clear an accused?
What is the difference between EUROPOL and INTERPOL? How does EUROPOL assist Member states investigation to control terrorist networks in Europe?
Several specific law enforcement strategies fall within the framework of intelligence-led policing. Discuss any four strategies.
What is Trade-Based Money Laundering (TBML)? Discuss with examples.
Do Cryptocurrencies have a high money laundering risk? Discuss.
